summary: One integration test (dubbo-samples-test-11137) timed out waiting for its test container to become ready, causing the CI job to fail.
root_cause: The integration test run for dubbo-samples-test-11137 timed out while waiting for its test container to start (wait for container is timeout: 602 s), resulting in a TEST FAILURE and overall job exit code 1.

evidence.quote: wait for container is timeout: 602 s
evidence.reason: Shows the test harness waited for a container but timed out after 602 seconds.
Explicit message that this test run timed out.

evidence.quote: [2/23] [dubbo-samples-test-11137:1/1] TEST FAILURE: Run tests timeout, version: -Ddubbo.version=3.3.7-SNAPSHOT -Dspring.version=5.3.24 -Djava.version=21, please check logs: /home/runner/work/dubbo/dubbo/99-integration/dubbo-samples-test-11137/target/logs
evidence.reason: The test framework reports a TEST FAILURE due to timeout and points to the log directory for investigation.

evidence.quote: zookeeper Error received unexpected HTTP status: 500 Internal Server Error
evidence.reason: Shows a Docker-related error (HTTP 500) while interacting with the zookeeper image which may have prevented container startup.

evidence.quote: Error response from daemon: received unexpected HTTP status: 500 Internal Server Error
evidence.reason: Confirms the Docker daemon returned an HTTP 500 during operations, which could cause containers to fail to pull/start.

suggested_fix: Check the test container logs at /home/runner/work/dubbo/dubbo/99-integration/dubbo-samples-test-11137/target/logs to determine why the container did not become ready. Investigate and resolve the Docker HTTP 500 errors (e.g., registry/network issues or image availability) shown in the logs. As a mitigation, consider increasing the test timeout (currently 600s) or making the container startup more robust, then re-run the job.
